Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_YUKARI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1009 0 0}Oh, there you are. I was taking a quick look up ahead![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Here you go. I picked this up while I was at it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_JUNPEI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2013 0 0}Yo, found ya! I made sure to clear you a path.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, here. I picked it off the ground earlier and thought of you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_SANADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3010 0 0}There you are. I went ahead and scouted the area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, take this. I picked it up while I was looking around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4009 0 0}Good, we've rendezvoused. I've already gone ahead and done some reconnaissance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I also found this. Put it to good use.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5109 0 0}Looks like Koro-chan found something we could use! Good boy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_AEGIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6008 0 0}I have been waiting for you. The path ahead has been cleared.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Also, this is for you. I collected it during my reconnaissance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_AMADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7011 0 0}Oh, there you are. I did a little scouting up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I also found this. Here, Aigis-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_ARAGAKI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9009 0 0}There you are. I checked out the area further ahead, so let's move.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh yeah... I picked this up, too. You hang onto it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_METIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30017 0 0}Hey, Sis! I finished scouting ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}Oh, right. I found this on the way. Could it be helpful to you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}Looks like you've all safely rendezvoused. Well done on the reconnaissance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REUNION_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It seems like you all met up safely. Thank you for scouting ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
